inputs.label: Total Direct College Cost
inputs.businessContext: Total direct costs of college: tuition, fees, books, and living expenses (not including foregone earnings).

businessContext_i18n.en: Total direct costs of college: tuition, fees, books, and living expenses (not including foregone earnings).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Üniversitenin toplam doğrudan maliyetleri: harç, ücretler, kitaplar ve yaşam giderleri (vazgeçilen kazançlar hariç).
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamte direkte Studienkosten: Studiengebühren, Bücher und Lebenshaltungskosten (ohne entgangene Einkünfte).

inputs.label: Expected Annual Salary After College
inputs.businessContext: Annual salary you expect to earn after graduation, in today's dollars.

businessContext_i18n.en: Annual salary you expect to earn after graduation, in today's dollars.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Mezuniyetten sonra kazanmayı beklediğiniz yıllık maaş, bugünün doları cinsinden.
businessContext_i18n.de: Jahresgehalt, das Sie nach dem Abschluss voraussichtlich verdienen werden, in heutigen Dollar.

inputs.label: Annual Salary Without College
inputs.businessContext: Annual salary you would earn if you didn't attend college.

businessContext_i18n.en: Annual salary you would earn if you didn't attend college.
businessContext_i18n.de: Jahresgehalt, das Sie ohne Studium verdienen würden.

inputs.label: Working Years
inputs.businessContext: Number of years you expect to work after graduation (or from now).

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of years you expect to work after graduation (or from now).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Mezuniyetten sonra (veya şu andan itibaren) çalışmayı beklediğiniz yıl sayısı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl der Jahre, die Sie nach dem Abschluss (oder ab jetzt) voraussichtlich arbeiten werden.

inputs.label: Annual Discount Rate
inputs.businessContext: Rate used to discount future cash flows to present value (e.g., inflation, required return). Must be greater than zero.

businessContext_i18n.en: Rate used to discount future cash flows to present value (e.g., inflation, required return). Must be greater than zero.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Gelecekteki nakit akışlarını bugünkü değere indirgemek için kullanılan oran (örneğin, enflasyon, gerekli getiri). Sıfırdan büyük olmalıdır.
businessContext_i18n.de: Abzinsungssatz für die Diskontierung zukünftiger Zahlungsströme auf den Barwert (z. B. Inflation, erforderliche Rendite). Muss größer als Null sein.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
